accepted_scope: The pre-observation setup and exact-root conflict are accepted. No benchmark capture or comparison occurred. The checked-in harness hashes root-specific dependency manifest paths into the shared environment while the comparator requires one shared fingerprint, so its documented two-root protocol is currently impossible.
downstream_authority: Fund a no-observation DKR that defines a root-independent package identity while retaining version and manifest-byte integrity, adds deterministic coverage, and returns an exact common harness amendment for both roots.
